timeline.subtitle: Sydney Olympic Gold
achievements: 馃 Sydney Olympics Men's Doubles Champion (with Wang Liqin)

achievements.title: 猸?Olympic Champion
achievements.description: Yan Sen was known for his left-hand penhold fast attack combined with loop play. He won the Sydney Olympic men's doubles gold partnering Wang Liqin.
